name: Cajun Spice
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all the ingredients in a bowl and store in an airtight container.
2. To cook fish, chicken, or steaks, heat a heavy, dry skillet over high heat.
3. Lightly brush the food with olive oil and coat it evenly with Cajun spice mixture.
4. Pan-fry for 1 minute per side or until cooked to your desired doneness.
